benefits.description: Hair growth still positively impacted at 2mg daily after titrating down from 5mg
Positive impact on skin visible at 2mg daily

side_effects.description: At 5mg daily, hair grew so fast that weekly haircuts were needed, which was unsustainable

protocol_notes: Previously took 5mg daily and observed very fast hair growth (weekly haircuts needed). Titrated down to 2mg daily as a sweet spot for skin benefits without excessive hair growth. Recommends testing to find individual sweet spot.
